header.Поддержка интересного и важного проекта: Support for an interesting and important project
header.title-line-1: Become part of the GoodSurfing community,
header.title-line-2: travel with meaning and support the project
header.desc1: GoodSurfing is a membership organization powered by the people who support it.
header.desc2: Membership is a way not just to use the project, but to help it live and grow.
header.title: Become part of the GoodSurfing community, travel with meaning, and support the project that makes it possible.

how-it-works.С оформленным членством Гудсёрфинга вы м: With a registered membership in GoodSurfing, you can use all the features of our service without any restrictions.
how-it-works.2. Проходите верификацию сервисом и полу: 2. Pass verification by the service and receive a special badge on your profile
how-it-works.3. Выбираете хосты на сервисе без ограни: 3. Choose hosts on the service without limitations
how-it-works.4. Хосты смотрят на вашу верификацию и о: 4. Hosts look at your verification and give you preferences
how-it-works.5. При необходимости пользуетесь чатом п: 5. If necessary, use the support chat to plan your journey
how-it-works.6. Делаете доброе дело и получаете незаб: 6. Do a good deed and get unforgettable impressions

international-club.title: GoodSurfing International Club
international-club.subtitle: For those who want to go beyond one country.
international-club.description: International membership is designed for participants who want to build connections with volunteer organizations worldwide, join international projects, and support the growth of GoodSurfing's global community.
international-club.benefit-2: access to the private international club;
international-club.benefit-6: opportunities to connect with partner organizations from different countries;
international-club.benefit-7: support for the growth of the GoodSurfing international network.
international-club.image-alt: Members of the GoodSurfing international community
international-club.contribution-description: Your charitable contribution helps develop GoodSurfing's international programs:
international-club.contribution-1: create new partnerships with organizations around the world;
international-club.contribution-3: represent Russian projects on international platforms;

what-is-goodsurfing.Что делает Гудсёрфинг и как он помогает: What GoodSurfing does and how it helps the community develop
what-is-goodsurfing.Миссия Гудсёрфинга – развитие выездного: The mission of GoodSurfing is to develop outbound volunteering in Russia and around the world by creating a convenient web service and disseminating information about such opportunities. Within this mission, we are constantly working on the technological part of the service, preparing and distributing useful content, and forming educational programs.
what-is-goodsurfing.Мы уверены, что тысячи людей разделят с: We are confident that thousands of people will share our values in meaningful travels and are ready to support us by joining the community. In turn, we will do everything possible for them to have comfortable, socially beneficial, and unforgettable meaningful travels.

why-pay.question: Why should I pay if I already help as a volunteer?
why-pay.answer: Your membership fee supports the project infrastructure: website development, content creation, event organization, and legal support. This helps GoodSurfing grow and become better for all participants.

not-renew.question: What happens if I do not renew my membership?
not-renew.answer: You can always remain part of the community, read the blog, and join open events. However, access to volunteer projects and closed materials will be limited until you renew your membership.

money.question: Where does my money go?
money.answer: We are a non-profit organization, and all funds go toward developing the project. You can review our reports and financial information in the About NPO section.

seo.title: GoodSurfing membership - meaningful travel without limits
seo.description: Get a GoodSurfing membership to support the project, unlock more volunteering opportunities, and join a community of meaningful travelers.
seo.keywords: GoodSurfing, membership, volunteering, travel with meaning, community, support project
seo.ogDescription: Join the GoodSurfing community and support the development of meaningful travel.

why-membership.title: Why membership matters
why-membership.p1: GoodSurfing was born from the idea that travel can be not only exciting but also useful. Inspired by the idea of mutual aid, we created a platform that makes outbound volunteering accessible, clear, and safe. Today we're an international community bringing together thousands of people ready to help others and make themselves and the world around them better.
why-membership.p2: For GoodSurfing to remain a living project, it needs support — and that support comes from the community members themselves.
why-membership.p3: Your membership is a contribution toward making sure meaningful travel and volunteer projects continue to exist.

donation.title: Support GoodSurfing
donation.subtitle: A one-time contribution of any size helps the project live and grow.
donation.funds-intro: We are a non-profit organization, and our main goal is not to make a profit but to develop outbound volunteering. Every ruble of membership fees goes toward:
donation.funds-1: Supporting and developing the technical side of the service: the website and technical infrastructure
donation.funds-2: Creating useful content and educational programs
donation.funds-3: Running events and supporting the community
donation.funds-4: Launching new useful initiatives for volunteers and hosts
donation.why-p1: Many people want useful social projects to exist. But such projects don't run on their own — behind them is always a team's work, digital infrastructure, and constant development.
donation.why-p2: Your support makes GoodSurfing sustainable, not just a one-time enthusiast project.
donation.help-1-text: Share information about our project on your social media — it helps us reach more people.
donation.help-2-text: If your company cares about social responsibility, consider becoming our partner.
donation.help-3-text: We're always glad to welcome people ready to support us with their actions. Joining the team is simple — just message us on social media.
